title: France, UK to work on 'peaceful multinational mission' for Hormuz
summary: France and Britain will work on a "peaceful multinational mission" to restore traffic through the Strait of Hormuz but it would be "separate from the warring parties", French President Emmanuel Macron said Monday.

title: Iran’s army says US plan to blockade Hormuz ‘amounts to piracy’
summary: The US restrictions on maritime navigation and transit in international waters are illegal, Iranian military says.
